title: trachymene lanceolata var. orbicularis
intro: Trachymene lanceolata var. orbicularis is a variety of flowering plant in the carrot family native to Western Australia. It is commonly known as a medicinal plant, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote relaxation. Trachymene lanceolata var. orbicularis can be prepared as a tea or infusion for oral consumption, and its leaves and roots can also be used in herbal remedies, such as ointments and salves.
